title: thelypteris hoalensis
intro: Thelypteris hoalensis, also known as the Tahitian fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in various medicinal applications, with its medicinal properties attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including relief from pain, reduction of fever, and improvement of respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. In traditional herbal preparations, Thelypteris hoalensis is often used in teas, infusions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
